name: spirit-realm-pets
description: 灵境宠界 - NFT宠物养成与元宇宙建造游戏

scripts.dev: npm run compile && concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../contracts && npm install

author: Spirit Realm Pets Team
